LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA IS GRANTED. MR. QUAN AND CHINATOWN RESTAURANT MUST FULLY COMPLY WITH THE SUBPOENA BY PRODUCING ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS AS TO ALL INDIVIDUALS WHO WORKED FOR THEM AS EITHER EMPLOYEES OR INDEPENDENT CONTRACTORS WITHIN 10 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR # 4102

Order To Show Cause To Jimmy (Toha) Quan
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. JILL J. FIGG, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3971 FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO;
ATTY. JOHN CHU, TEL. NO. 989-5300 FOR THE RESPONDENT CHINATOWN RESTAURANT INC;

RULING - ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO JIMMY (TOHA) QUAN RE: CONTEMPT- AFTER HEARING THE MATTER, THE COURT FOUND CHINATOWN RESTAURANT INC. IN CONTEMPT OF COURT FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENA AND COURT ORDER. CHINATOWN RESTAURANT INC. IS FINED $1,000.00 AND IN ADDITION TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF THE SUBPOENA. THE AGENT MR. QUAN IS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE TO PAY ATTORNEY'S FEES. THE CITY NEEDS TO APPLY FOR THESE FEES IN A SEPARATE MOTION. THE CITY MAY ALSO INSTITUTE ANY OTHER ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEDURE IT DEEMS NECESSARY TO GET THE INFORMATION TO WHICH IT IS ENTITLED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

City And County Of San Francisco'S Order To Show Cause Re Enforcement Of Subpoena
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jill J. Figg of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3971, appearing for petitioner and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: City and County of San Francisco's Order to Show Cause RE: ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENA. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SUBPOENA. Order signed in open Court. (301/DEW/DM) JUDGE: DIANE WICK, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT, CSR# 2737
